creator: barzog@telecom.by
text:
/bin/sh ./libtool --silent --tag=CXX   --mode=compile c++ -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I.  -I./../.. -I./.. -I./../../ -I./llvm/include -I./llvm/include -D__STDC_LIMIT_MACROS -D__STDC_CONSTANT_MACROS -D_DEBUG -D_GNU_SOURCE -I/usr/local/include   -Woverloaded-virtual -pedantic -Wno-long-long -Wall -W -Wno-unused-parameter -Wwrite-strings -Wno-missing-field-initializers -Wno-variadic-macros -fno-exceptions -O2 -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe -c -o SlotIndexes.lo `test -f 'llvm/lib/CodeGen/SlotIndexes.cpp' || echo './'`llvm/lib/CodeGen/SlotIndexes.cpp
llvm/lib/CodeGen/SjLjEHPrepare.cpp: In member function 'virtual bool<unnamed>::SjLjEHPass::doInitialization(llvm::Module&)':
llvm/lib/CodeGen/SjLjEHPrepare.cpp:99: warning: missing sentinel in function call
{standard input}: Assembler messages:
{standard input}:23966: Warning: end of file not at end of a line; newline inserted
c++: Internal error: Killed: 9 (program cc1plus)
